title: psychotria venosa
intro: Psychotria venosa, also known as the "venous Psychotria" or "wild coffee," is a tropical plant species native to the Caribbean and Central America, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Psychotria venosa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an expectorant to help clear bronchial congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically dried and used to make tea or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
